name: get_availability
description: Find real bookable appointment times for one published offering on a local calendar date. Each returned team member at each time has a unique slot_id; copy exactly one chosen slot_id into book_appointment or reschedule_appointment. Call this after collecting the web customer's contact number and before offering any times. Never invent availability.

parameters.description: The offering, local date, and optional preferred team member.

offering_name.description: Exact published offering name, such as Haircut or Technical support session.

date.description: Calendar date in the organization's timezone, formatted YYYY-MM-DD.

team_member_name.description: Optional exact published team member name when the customer has a preference.
